rationale: Review 2's Is-prefix demands are questionable (Mathlib itself uses Algebra.IsGeometricallyReduced and Algebra.FiniteType without Is in this same file), and its valid observations (the True-typed stub field and the oddly named lemma) concern placeholder scaffolding that will naturally be renamed or replaced when real content is added. Review 1 correctly finds nothing material to change. Neither review would produce a meaningfully better PR.
